courses.title: 100X
courses.subtitle: Prepare • Protect • Produce
courses.description: Prepare your heart for spiritual transformation through the parable of the four soils.

courses.title: Identity Through The Trinity
courses.subtitle: Who is God and How Does He See You?
courses.tagline: God Designed You To Be Just Like Him.
courses.description: We all have blind spots. Blind spots distort the way you see God, yourself and your ability to hear God clearly. Your true identity is revealed through the Trinity.

courses.title: Hindered Hearing
courses.subtitle: 5 Things That Could Hold You Back From Hearing God
courses.description: God is speaking but can you hear Him clearly? Discover what might be blocking your spiritual reception.

courses.title: The Way
courses.subtitle: The Essentials of the Christian Faith
courses.tagline: Discover the foundational truths of following Jesus
courses.description: The Way is a comprehensive 6-session course covering the essential beliefs and practices of the Christian faith. From understanding the Trinity to walking in the gifts of the Spirit, this course establishes the foundational truths every follower of Jesus needs to know.

courses.title: The Bridge
courses.subtitle: Prophetic Evangelism
courses.tagline: Living on mission every day of your Christian life
courses.description: Move from awkward to authentic in sharing your faith. Learn to craft your testimony, ask transformative questions, hear God for others, and step into your calling as an ambassador of Christ.
